# Issue Management

## Applies when
- Creating, triaging, or updating GitLab issues.
- The user references labels, milestones, priorities, or templates.

## Instructions
- Gather essentials before drafting: title, description, severity, labels, project/group, and related issues/MRs.
- Follow GitLab label and workflow conventions (status + area labels); suggest defaults if not provided but confirm before applying.
- When using MCP tools, specify project scope and whether to create, update, or link issues; avoid writes unless the user consents.
- Include acceptance criteria and reproduction steps for bugs; add success metrics for features.
- Offer quick follow-ups: assign owner, set milestone, add due date, and create linked MR draft if applicable.
